writeup: The Buffalo Bills wrapped up their final week of OTAs heading into the weekend of June 5, 2026, with practices drawing attention to key position battles and player development. Late OTA sessions typically offer the clearest picture of where the roster stands before the mandatory minicamp locks in the depth chart narrative. Coaches and players spoke to the progress made over the three-week OTA window, setting expectations for the June 9–12 minicamp. With the offseason program nearing its final structured phase, competition at several positions appeared to be heating up ahead of training camp.

articles.title: Highlights from Buffalo Bills 2026 OTAs as Week 3 Begins
